However, the badgers soon have to eat their words after a magnifying glass causes a fire and it's Podge who alerts Wissper and teams up with Ellington Elephant to rescue them(n)

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Racket the ogre wants to become a pirate and Pirata is put in charge of training him, but he does not have any of the right qualities(n)

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: Flo and Fleeker find out that Boomer has been watching Boy Hooman's guitar lessons and has made himself a guitar too(n)

programme.title: Digby Dragon
programme.desc: Digby has a clearout but getting rid of his old toys is harder than he expected(n)

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: The girls take part in a Zahracorn race, while Zeta and Nazboo also enter with a tiny, speedy one named Tickles(n)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a flock of clams descends on Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob feeds them some Krabby Patty so that he can get a better look at them all. Unfortunately, this has the effect of making all the clams follow him wherever he goes and they are eating all the food and causing chaos.(n)

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves an obstacle(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: WWE SmackDown Highlights
programme.desc: Spectacular grappling action with the over-the-top stars of the States, profiling fighters causing a stir and following feuds as they spill out of the ring(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel's separation begins to cause friction among the pals, who feel they have to choose between the estranged pair - and an impending skiing holiday only makes matters worse. Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer star(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is shocked to discover her half-brother Frank is planning to marry a woman more than twice his age. Chandler tries to stop smoking with the aid of hypnosis, only to suffer strange side-effects, and Monica gets a handy tip that could net her a small fortune(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica steals the heart of a millionaire, but Ross's spirits plummet thanks to Rachel, who dates his arch-rival Mark. Meanwhile, Joey lands a part in a new play, but clashes with his female co-star. Guest starring Iron Man director Jon Favreau(n)

programme.title: A Will to Kill: Hailey Dean Mysteries (2018)
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of Hailey's ex-fiance from 15 years previously is reopened and the disappearance of a student working at a college paper may be connected to the case. Whodunit, starring Kellie Martin and Giacomo Baessato(n)

programme.title: A Prescription for Murder: Hailey Dean Mysteries (2019)
programme.desc: The CEO of a hospital dies while a patient and Hailey helps the police with their investigations when her coroner boyfriend discovers that the woman had been poisoned. Whodunit, starring Kellie Martin(n)

programme.title: The King and I (1956)
programme.desc: The relationship between the powerful King of Siam and a widowed English schoolteacher, recruited to tutor his wives and many children, begins with restrained hostility - but gradually gives way to more tender feelings. Oscar-winning Rodgers and Hammerstein musical, starring Deborah Kerr, Yul Brynner, Rita Moreno, Martin Benson and Terry Saunders(n)

programme.title: The King and I (1956)
programme.desc: The relationship between the powerful King of Siam and a widowed English schoolteacher, recruited to tutor his wives and many children, begins with restrained hostility - but gradually gives way to more tender feelings. Oscar-winning Rodgers and Hammerstein musical, starring Deborah Kerr, Yul Brynner, Rita Moreno, Martin Benson and Terry Saunders(n)

programme.title: Royal Doctors: Treating the Monarchy
programme.desc: Documentary examining the role of the medics who have looked after the royal family through the ages. The programme looks at the tricks the royals use to avoid gorging at banquets, reveals how Prince Philip can still fit in his marriage uniform and what it is really like to give birth inside the Lindo Wing. Plus, historian Kate Williams explores some of the gruesome tales from royal history(n)

programme.title: The Royals: A Family in Crisis
programme.desc: A look at issues affecting the monarchy in 2019, including the rift between princes Harry and William that would eventually led to the Duke and Duchess of Sussex acrimoniously quitting the royal family entirely. Plus, the scandal surrounding Prince Andrew's friendship with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein, and Prince Philip's car crash and his ongoing health problem(n)

programme.title: Charles and Di: The Truth Behind Their Wedding
programme.desc: Documentary examining the week immediately prior to the Royal Wedding of Prince Charles and Lady Diana Spencer in July 1981, which lifted the spirits of the nation during a turbulent time. Interviewees include people who knew the couple, such as Mary Robertson, Col Robert Spencer and Angela Rippon, who carried out a pre-wedding interview as well as presenting the live coverage on the day(n)

programme.title: The Carpenters: Their Greatest Hits
programme.desc: In a 14-year career, brother-and-sister duo Richard and Karen Carpenter won three Grammys and had 17 US Adult Contemporary Billboard chart number ones. Narrated by Ken Bruce, this programme features classic performances and official music videos of 16 songs featuring the much-loved duo. Each is accompanied by interesting facts about the act President Richard Nixon once described as 'Young America at its very best'(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher(n)

programme.title: My Friend Dahmer (2017)
programme.desc: The early years of Ohio serial killer Jeffrey Dahmer are charted in this drama inspired by his friend Derf Backderf's graphic novel, starring Ross Lynch, Anne Heche and Alex Wolff(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 2 (1990)
programme.desc: Tough cop John McClane arrives at an airport to pick up his wife, but finds himself plunged into a bloody life-or-death struggle. He must battle terrorists who have seized control of the terminal as part of a campaign to secure the release of a convicted drug baron. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Bonnie Bedelia, William Sadler, Franco Nero and William Atherton(n)

programme.title: Kill Your Friends (2015)
programme.desc: A treacherous, cocaine-addicted record executive enjoys success at the height of the Britpop era, but as public tastes change, he finds himself floundering and desperate for a hit. He soon realises that the best way to stay on top is to eliminate his rivals by any means necessary. Drama based on John Niven's novel, starring Nicholas Hoult, Ed Skrein, James Corden and Rosanna Arquette(n)

programme.title: Malta Story (1953)
programme.desc: The island of Malta comes under siege during the Second World War, as both Allied and Axis forces see it as vital to their supply lines. A British reconnaissance pilot arrives on the island, and plays a crucial role in defending it from the advancing enemy forces. Drama, starring Alec Guinness, Anthony Steel, Jack Hawkins, Muriel Pavlow and Flora Robson(n)

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City (1959)
programme.desc: A gambler becomes the sheriff of a frontier town, planning to use his position to avenge his brother's murderers - but the arrival of a face from the past muddies the water, and leaves him doubting the identity of the killer. Western, starring Joel McCrea, Julie Adams, John McIntire, Nancy Gates and Richard Anderson(n)

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger(n)

programme.title: Gallipoli (1981)
programme.desc: Two patriotic Australians join the army to fight during the First World War. However, their youthful idealism is quickly eroded by the harsh reality of the conflict, and their friendship is tested to the very limits of endurance as they prepare for combat ahead of the pivotal battle of Gallipoli in Turkey. Drama, directed by Peter Weir, starring Mel Gibson, Mark Lee, Bill Kerr and David Argue(n)

programme.title: The Host (2013)
programme.desc: Earth is invaded by parasitic aliens which possess humans, but one of the creatures discovers the consciousness of her teenage host has not been fully repressed. The human part of their personality persuades her to turn her back on her race and seek out free humans, leading her to a resistance group fighting to free mankind. Sci-fi adventure, starring Saoirse Ronan, Max Irons and William Hurt(n)

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton(n)

programme.title: Brawl in Cell Block 99 (2017)
programme.desc: A former boxer is blackmailed into performing a prison hit by a ruthless drug kingpin. Crime thriller, starring Vince Vaughn, Jennifer Carpenter and Don Johnson(n)

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter(n)

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre longs for his simple life as a feared monster, so strikes a deal with magical trickster Rumpelstiltskin to get back to the way things were. However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)
programme.desc: Martial arts master panda Po continues to hone his skills when an evil peacock, who was banished from China for trying to build a deadly new weapon, returns to cause more chaos. It falls to Po to defeat him, but he suffers strange flashbacks revealing a connection between his past and the sinister bird. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman(n)

programme.title: Mary and the Witch's Flower (2017)
programme.desc: A strange flower grants a girl magic powers. Animated adventure based on The Little Broomstick by Mary Stewart, featuring the voices of Kate Winslet and Jim Broadbent. Dubbed in English(n)

programme.title: Gifted (2017)
programme.desc: Single man Frank Adler attempts to raise his child prodigy niece, Mary. However, his plans for a normal school life for the youngster are foiled when the youngster's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn. Drama, starring Chris Evans, Lindsay Duncan and Mckenna Grace(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0 (2007)
programme.desc: Tough New York cop John McClane is sent to escort a computer hacker to Washington for questioning. During this routine operation he stumbles on a criminal mastermind's plan to launch a technological terrorist attack on the US, and is forced to enlist the hacker's aid in foiling the evil scheme. Action thriller sequel, with Bruce Willis, Timothy Olyphant, Justin Long and Maggie Q(n)

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell (2009)
programme.desc: A bank employee refuses a mortgage extension to an elderly woman, who responds by placing her under a curse. As she endures a series of unexplained misfortunes, she discovers a demon has been sent after her, and if she cannot break the spell in three days, it will take her to Hell. Sam Raimi's horror, starring Alison Lohman, Justin Long and Lorna Raver(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben panics when he realises he has forgotten his mother's birthday yet again, so he enlists an unwilling Danny, Tucker and Riley to organise a celebration in a hurry. Danny is happily dating his new girlfriend Robyn, but is disturbed to realise that she seems to have more in common with Ben(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike gets caught up in an argument between Molly and her family - and unwittingly makes matters worse. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Barry get jobs at Spencer's Gifts, then Murray insists Adam get a job as well, but Beverly is adamant that he should focus on film-making(n)

Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben, Riley, Danny and Tucker wonder where their own lives are heading when Bonnie delegates a very important job to them. Riley feels conflicted about her relationships with Ben and Danny, and Bonnie makes a decision that leaves everyone feeling frustrated(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: Mike & Molly

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle go on an eight-day stakeout, which puts a strain on their friendship. Meanwhile, Jeffords uses Santiago and Gina for inspiration when he writes a book about his daughters, and Captain Holt's nephew visits Brooklyn and makes an instant impression on Diaz. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Nick Cannon(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie's friendly foe Charlotte helps her prepare for the wedding - but fears arise she may have other plans up her sleeve. Comedy, guest starring Reba McEntire, with Melissa Peterman and Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley faints after Danny asks her to marry him, and when she wakes up, she has no memory of his proposal. Trying to move on from Riley, Ben straight away hits it off with new neighbour Zoey. However, Ben is shocked when their first date reveals he and Zoey have more in common than he thought. Bonnie is determined to finally marry Brad after many aborted attempts, and believing Ben and Danny are to blame, enlists Tucker to help her tie the knot without her sons' knowledge(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Peggy leaves her dog for Mike and Molly to look after while she goes out of town, saying it will be good practice for when they have children. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple are left without a wedding chapel when Molly's attitude upsets a priest. Comedy drama, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly intervenes when she finds out that Coach Mellor has a strained relationship with his brother, Coach Nick, but when the two men face off in the gym, Adam and Barry join in. Meanwhile, Geoff and Erica struggle with their long-distance relationship(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam struggles to curb his overprotective ways as Kate prepares to go out on her first date. Meanwhile, Don enlists Lowell to help him find the perfect anniversary gift for Marcy(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj endures an anxious day as he worries that a space probe he helped design will not function properly, while Leonard and Sheldon agree to go clothes shopping with Penny and Amy. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes concerned that his comfortable lifestyle is having an impact on his professional progress and is stopping him from achieving scientific greatness, so he asks the gang to make life more difficult for him. Meanwhile, Howard invents an unflattering game about Raj. Starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo try to get to the bottom of a twisted mystery when aliens transport them into a familiar but alternate reality created in a huge simulation chamber on board their spaceship. An oblivious Jerry is accidentally included in the experiment but fails to notice the subtle changes in his surroundings as he makes a big advertising pitch at work. An episode inspired by the twist-filled films of M Night Shyamalan, guest starring David Cross (Arrested Development)(n)

programme.title: Mr Pickles
programme.desc: The collie is dog-napped, and a gang of bounty hunters race to collect the reward on his head(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: An expose into really happened to Bambi's mother. Plus, an Animorph revives the red panda population, Brainy Smurf gets diagnosed with CTE and Bitch Pudding goes up against Norman Bates to see who is more psycho. Animated comedy series, created by Seth Green and Matthew Senreich(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo visit another planet to purchase wiper fluid and witness an annual event where the local populace commits crimes for one night without consequence. Jerry and Summer work on their father-daughter relationship, but his lack of employment keeps coming up(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn there's more to Lt Melanie Hawkins' team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didn't commit, it's up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail(n)

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.desc: Personal trainer Tracy is concerned that she might be a sex addict, barman Tom needs an STI test and Jordan is worried about a suspicious lump on his bottom(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney is relieved that a woman he slept with is not pregnant, and creates a new holiday to celebrate not being a father. However, Lily and Marshall are contemplating having children, and ask Ted and Robin to help them decide what to do(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney tries to persuade his boss to hire Ted to redesign the office building, while an unemployed Robin starts hanging out with 'woo girls', a name the gang members give to single women who shout a lot on nights out. Cobie Smulders and Alyson Hannigan star(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises(n)

programme.title: Romance Retreat (2019)
programme.desc: An ambitious journalist escapes to a remote yoga retreat to avoid the fallout from her coverage of a scandal. While there, she discovers the billionaire tech guru at the heart of the story is also looking to get away from it all at the same location. Romantic comedy, starring Amanda Schull and Morgan David Jones(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fun-loving groom-to-be Liam wants a wedding day that really celebrates his native Isle of Wight, but his future wife Kandi is hoping for a more conventional day(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job does not go to plan(n)

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: After watching the classic film Rudy in CB's class, a student wants to play football. Principal Glascott suggests Lainey find a girlfriend to give her advice on life(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cop comedy returns after a mid-season break. When one of the precincts in the area must be closed, an evaluation process takes place. The squad is confident about its assessment - until it turns out the auditor is Santiago's ex-boyfriend Teddy(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords wants to file an official complaint against a fellow police officer who stops him in his own neighbourhood while he is off duty, but Captain Holt has other ideas. Peralta and Santiago glimpse the difficulties of parenthood when they babysit for Jeffords' children(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeant's exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt's mother seeks support from the precinct when her house is burgled. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiago's favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. Meanwhile, the scientists become obsessed with an unusual new card game, and Penny organises a round of Twister. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amy's career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partner's achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff's wedding. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. The programme captures their instant reactions to The Crown, Victoria Derbyshire, I'm A Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, The X Factor: Celebrity, The Andrew Marr Show, Panorama: The Prince and the Epstein Scandal, This Morning and First Dates(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: In an updated version of a previous episode, Jasmine Harman meets Bernie and George Wilks, who want to start a new adventure living in the Spanish area of Oliva(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Sue and Mike Bloomfield from Manchester have been holidaying in Portugal for over 20 years. Now that their children have flown the nest - and with Mike's retirement just around the corner - they think the time's right to buy a holiday home on the Algarve, so Jasmine Harman shows them five properties within their budget of £150,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton shows a number of properties to Mena and Bal Patel, who want to buy a holiday home in Orihuela on the Costa Blanca in Spain(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her husband after he suffers a cardiac arrest and a multi-vehicle collision in Bedford leaves one patient with potentially life-changing injuries(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Natalka Greenwood and Sam Watson treat a 10-year-old autistic boy who has injured his back on a trampoline. Emma Snelson and Lizzie Hobday rush to a baby who has stopped breathing(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge helps Lincolnshire couple Tim and Rebecca find their feet after leaving the UK to start a new life in a dilapidated 25-room chateau that has no plumbing(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Black Lion in Halland, East Sussex, where host Nigel Fright gets off to a shaky start when a kettle goes missing from one of the rooms. Later, he takes the guests to a salsa class, where Sherrill Tacy and Hayley Cotton are surprised by some of his dance moves(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Wheatsheaf Inn in Exning, near Newmarket, Suffolk, where guests are welcomed by owner Ken Clutterbuck and employee Ginny Trow. The proprietor tries to win his rivals round with his unique sense of humour, but tensions rise when the contestants go for a spin on a go-kart track(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sherrill Tacy hosts at the Sherwood Guesthouse in New Brighton on the Wirral, and is praised for the establishment's value for money. However, there is upset when her breakfast leaves a lot to be desired, and her final review is far from perfect(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Final hosts Mark and Rachael Dann welcome the contestants to the Big Bear Lodge in Shropshire. They face the tough job of trying to keep the rift between some of the guests to a minimum in their ski-themed B&B, and their afternoon activity of canoeing raises a few laughs but accusations of cheating occur when the boys begin to get competitive(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service that they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers introduce some new, young males to Bertha, the South American blue poison dart frog that loves to wrestle, in the hope that one of them will be strong enough to win her over. A new mandrill monkey named Kamau arrives at the zoo to be introduced to the group, but the keepers are worried that his lack of experience with females might be a problem(n)

programme.title: Crufts
programme.desc: Clare Balding hosts live coverage from the NEC in Birmingham. Today's theme is Which Dog Is Best for Me and My Lifestyle? Featured events include Heelwork to Music, and Clare is also joined by a range of celebrity guests, as well as roving reporter Radzi Chinyanganya and commentators Jim Rosenthal, Graham Partridge, Frank Kane and Jessica Holm(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Andy Stakes and Jeanette Hardy, who are building a new house on top of a sheer cliff on the west coast of Scotland. The pair want to spend £250,000 on a two-bedroom, glass-fronted and earth-sheltered home for themselves and their two beloved Newfoundland dogs. However, construction on such an exposed site is fraught with danger and the pair face no end of problems throughout the build, and a last minute design change that begs the biggest question: even if Andy finishes the house, will Jeanette actually like it?(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Harewood House, a stately home which looks out over 1000 acres of West Yorkshire estate, and was built in 1759 by Edwin Lascelles, 1st Earl of Harewood(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital treat patients involved in traffic accidents. Jade from Kent is brought in after being hit by a car and knocked under a bus on her way to school, and doctors are concerned the 12-year-old may have fractured her skull. Meanwhile, Geraldine, 60, has been injured while trying to cross the road, and after recently being released from prison 40-year-old Brian is in minors with a broken ankle, but the swelling means his electronic curfew tag will have to be removed(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, focusing on car crimes committed by young drivers. PC Nick Denning is dispatched in pursuit of a 'pool car' - a cheap, unregistered car shared by several friends - which is currently being driven at breakneck speed around residential streets. Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Harewood House, a stately home which looks out over 1000 acres of West Yorkshire estate, and was built in 1759 by Edwin Lascelles, 1st Earl of Harewood(n)

PC Nick Denning is dispatched in pursuit of a 'pool car' - a cheap, unregistered car shared by several friends - which is currently being driven at breakneck speed around residential streets. Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty takes to the skies above Israel as he joins the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly and explores whether dishwasher salt is suitable to put on chips. Kate Quilton visits Vietnam to find out if coconut oil is any healthier than other oils and heads to the Amazon rainforest to investigate rumours that the Brazil nuts on UK supermarket shelves are all radioactive(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Matt and Sharron have recently celebrated their 10th wedding anniversary and now want to move permanently to Almería in southern Spain, along with their beloved dog, Sammy. Jasmine Harman helps turn their dream into reality by showing them five very different options for a budget of £60,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Berkshire charity worker Lynda Feymor has travelled all over the world, but it's Portugal's Eastern Algarve that's captured her heart. With a budget of £175,000, Jasmine Harman scours every nook and cranny of the local market to find five properties, but can any of them give Lynda the 'feeling' she is searching for?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows Warwickshire couple Lorraine and Neville Bulsara five holiday homes in the Spanish region of La Marina Alta within their budget of £160,000. It's not an easy decision because the properties present the couple with a tricky dilemma of whether to buy on the coast or in the country(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a drunk driver who has crashed on a duel carriageway but find themselves on the receiving end of a vicious attack. In Bromsgrove, a paramedic's ambulance comes under siege as they try to attend to another drunk member of the public(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them. In the opening episode, ther duo give Johnny a crash course in the dos and don'ts of chateau shopping before he and his wife start the search for their own dream place. Jonathan and Michael, who are struggling to turn their magnificent French castle into a money-making venture, explore some of their chateau's caves in the hope of finding a buried fortune. Plus, Phil and Angelina struggle to pitch their chateau as the perfect place for a 50th wedding anniversary party when they can't see eye to eye themselves(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at One4 B&B in Cheltenham, where debonair art-dealing host Nick Purchase hopes to prove his that his establishment offers the best value for money. However, things get off to a less-than-ideal start when a life-drawing class leaves one of his guests in a fit of nervous giggles(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Windy Bottom B&B in Maidstone, Kent, where owners Gloria Barnett and Dave Goulding try to impress their guests with a trip to Leeds Castle. However, a proprietor manages to offend one of her rivals, and another is not impressed at being allocated a Versace-themed room(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Jolly Carter pub in Bolton, Greater Manchester, run by Phil and Angie Sutcliffe. Despite a few nerves about the accommodation not measuring up, the room inspections go well, but the guests' verdict on the afternoon's roller disco remains to be seen(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John Humberstone hosts at the 18-room Alexandra Hotel in Llandudno, where he hopes the scaffolding on the outside of his establishment will not ruin his chances. However, when one of the guests gets locked in a bathroom and there is a slip-up with towels and teabags, it seems he has plenty of other things to worry about(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured on the show reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service that they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Malindi the eastern black rhino is pregnant, but she's not her usual self. After giving birth unexpectedly during the middle of the day, the keepers hope that her lively baby, Jumaane, will bring her out of her shell and restore her independent spirit. Dusky pademelon males Kai and Aru have been fighting with each other, so the staff decide to split them up(n)

programme.title: Crufts
programme.desc: Further coverage from the NEC in Birmingham, where the day's theme is Health and Wellbeing. Featured events include Flyball, Agility and Heelwork to Music. Introduced by Clare Balding, with roving reporter Radzi Chinyanganya and commentators Jim Rosenthal, Graham Partridge, Frank Kane and Jessica Holm(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin: Last Flight of the Vulcan Bomber
programme.desc: The mechanic joins a select crew of engineers working to prepare the last Vulcan bomber that is capable of flight for a farewell tour of the UK. The programme features contributions from former crew members, who recall its service in conflicts from the 1950s to the Falklands, as well as serving as Britain's nuclear deterrent(n)

programme.title: Just One Look
programme.desc: Eva begins to see some light in the dark mystery surrounding Bastien and his friends - they were all once part of a music group and a tragic event seems to have set off a trail of danger and destruction around them. Serge Leroux, who has just got out of prison, appears to be behind Bastien's abduction - but what is his link with the group? Thriller, starring Virginie Ledoyen. In French(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Medics at King's College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into A&E after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition sees staff at King's College Hospital in south London treat patients involved in serious road accidents. Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Medics at King's College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into A&E after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision(n)

Former soldier Steve, 48, was found unconscious at the wheel, 11-year-old schoolgirl Scarlett has been knocked down by a car, and Pauline, 70, was hit by a vehicle that mounted the pavement, seriously injuring her lower legs(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations. Jimmy Doherty visits Thailand to find out if the alarming headlines about additive MSG are justified, Kate Quilton heads to California to find out why there are so many closed pistachios in the packs on supermarket shelves, and Matt Tebbutt learns why slicing onions makes people cry with help from an innovative farmer and a team of cage fighters(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty takes to the skies above Israel as he joins the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly and explores whether dishwasher salt is suitable to put on chips. Kate Quilton visits Vietnam to find out if coconut oil is any healthier than other oils and heads to the Amazon rainforest to investigate rumours that the Brazil nuts on UK supermarket shelves are all radioactive(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Robin and Susan Loxton from Suffolk want to seize the day and buy a holiday home near Mijas, in their favourite part of southern Spain. Danni Menzies shows them some serious property contenders that offer amazing value, but whether any of them will prove 'the perfect fit' remains to be seen(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Paul from Glasgow are newly engaged and want to kick start the next chapter of their lives together by buying a family holiday home in the area around Oliva in eastern Spain. Ben Hillman leaves no stone unturned to find property contenders for their budget of £50,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies shows Simon and Mary Loyne five suitable properties to purchase on the Costa Almeria, now the couple have sold their Cheshire home ahead of a new life in Spain(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

Kirstie Allsopp is with Mikey and Anna, who are looking for a flat in the West End of Glasgow. However, so far they have fallen foul of the competitive market in a search that has become something of a family affair(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop manager Nicola Steele hosts the first dinner party in Cardiff, and hopes that her dog-themed surprises and unusual entertainment will impress her guests - army wife Rachael Smith, casting agency owner Jerry Lockett, childminder Andrea Grainger and chatterbox Sam Clark - and win her the £1,000 cash prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jerry Lockett hosts the second dinner party in Cardiff, and following a flood at his home, hopes to impress his guests by serving the meal at the grand venue of his cousin's mansion(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Army wife Rachael Smith hosts the third party in Cardiff, allowing her competitive edge and no-nonsense approach to come to the fore in her bid to pick up the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Costume designer Sam Clarke prepares a Mexican menu for the fourth dinner party in Cardiff. Everything does not go to plan, however, when two guests begin fighting at the table, and his 'fun' game leaves everyone in tears(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childminder Andrea Grainger hosts the last dinner party as the competition in Cardiff draws to a close. She hopes a menu of traditional Welsh dishes will help her secure the prize, and lines up a selection of games to improve her chances of success. As the evening comes to an end, the diners discover which of the meals made the best impression(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Bell House Hotel in Wiltshire, where business partners Chris Williams and Jacqui Hogg hope guests will appreciate their attempts to bring London chic to the shires. Susan and David Speak are frustrated by the low shower pressure, while Jade Hendon butts heads with Matthew over healthy eating at dinner and the hosts' absence at breakfast the next morning gets the criticism flowing(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Partridge in Oxfordshire, where young couple Matthew Cockman and Paula Szkwarkowska hope guests will get on board with their passion for local organic food. A communal bathroom has the guests lost for words, and the lack of a hot breakfast included in the price leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouths(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Strawberry Gardens B&B in Heysham for the third day of the contest, where husband and wife team Susan and David Speak offer home-from-home accommodation and an abundance of northern hospitality. Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Bateman's Mill near Chesterfield, where manager Jade Hendon has high hopes of being the best. But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores, starting with Chris and Jacqui, owners of the Bell House, who want to find out why Matthew marked them down for being 'too tall' for his bed. The group members proceed to thrash out their differences before the week's winners are revealed(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: The concluding edition explores the emotionally charged difficulties of being a mother in prison. Staff at HMP Foston Hall, where more than 300 women are incarcerated for everything from murder to non-payment of fines, believe that maintaining family contact is vital to reduce reoffending. Kelly challenges the family court to renew contact with her young boys, while Lexi is trying to figure out how to tell her young son why she is in jail as now he is getting older he has started to ask her questions about it(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: One of the fugitives is captured by the hunters, who subject her to devious psychological pressures to reveal her partner's whereabouts. Hayley misses her dog and risks returning to Wigan to intercept the pup - unaware her every move is being tracked. Will her pet reunion come at a high price?(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons hoping to pair up over dinner include healthcare assistant Anthony, who wants to put his wild past behind him. Is speech therapist Lawrence 'the one'? Wedding singer Georgina has a blind date with property developer Adam, who prides himself on knowing how to treat a woman, while receptionist Bev sits down with former bank manager Howard, who is strangely familiar(n)

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade guides a team of well-known faces around the four zones of the Maze, tackling a range of skill, mystery, physical and mental challenges. Anita Rani assumes the role of captain, alongside team-mates Jeff Stelling, Hannah Cockcroft, AJ Pritchard and Tom Rosenthal. As usual self-congratulatory highs, lock-in lows and some semblances of redemption lie in store for all concerned(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two couples, Cherelle and Leon, and teachers Richard and Jo, who were both looking for new homes in 2017. In Croydon, Phil Spencer helped local couple Cherelle and Leon, who were rapidly being priced out the area. Meanwhile in Reading, teachers Richard and Jo sought Phil's aid as they searched for a new home for them and their two daughters, and had only six weeks to find one. Now, Phil returns to catch up with the couples and find out what happened next(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with an Anglo-French couple who lived in a barn to maximise their earnings and a fruit juice entrepreneur trying to expand into new markets on the French Riviera(n)

programme.title: Beat the Chef

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: James Constantinou reluctantly takes to the skies above the Isle of Wight in a plane with folding wings. Ex-Big Brother housemate Chelsea Singh wants to borrow £50,000 against his beloved Bentley, while a former agent to the stars brings in a piece of entertainment history(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire and Worcestershire. Henry makes a table from the base of a broken agricultural grain mill, while Simon creates a garden seat from an old mangle(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four contestants in Brighton compete to hold the perfect dinner party, beginning with clothing store owner Andrew - who holds a Brian Blessed-themed evening - and one of his guests does not recognise the actor. Next is businesswoman Karen, who supplies her diners with fine wines and pink foods, followed by rock chick Binny, who thinks she has the potential to win. Finally, fourth host Brendan hopes to do enough to take the lead(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four contestants in Leicestershire compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with careers advisor Kate and her Mediterranean-themed menu. Second is careworker Mike, who believes that the way to victory is through fine dining and all things posh, before flight attendant Jessica has her turn. Finally, international businessman John's less-than forthcoming nature leaves his guests with questions unanswered. At the end of the evening, he reveals all, but it remains to be seen how the guests react and whether the revelations will affect the scores(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada

He dons a fat suit and a new identity, and soon makes discoveries about staff morale and equipment, before the story of one worker's loss makes him realise the important steps he has to take(n)

programme.desc: The medic struggles to decide which of the remaining candidates to employ. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Dan Hauser, Laura's former team captain, calls her out of the blue from his prison. Acting on his tip-off, she and Jake visit an old warehouse owned by gangster Thomas Mullens, aka the Irishman, where she finds the bodies of Sarah Price and Gary West, who disappeared after they stole $10million in unmarked currency. However, Laura has not told Santiani about the tip off and finds herself in hot water when her duplicity is discovered after Dan and Mullens escape from their maximum security prison. Laura is taken off the case, but ignores the ban and persuades her team to keep her informed of the manhunt's progress. Debra Messing stars(n)

programme.desc: A man's death offers no immediate explanation, until the autopsy points Green and Cassady in the direction of illegally harvested donor bones, which the dead man had received in a transplant. However, McCoy and Rubirosa struggle to bring the case to prosecution when it becomes clear they can only get the necessary evidence by testing another transplant recipient(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The husband of a well-known actress is gunned down outside a shop while holding a baby the couple had recently adopted from Africa. Guest starring Anna Chlumsky (My Girl) and Jennifer Beals (Lie to Me)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green attend the scene of a double homicide at an exclusive restaurant. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bar-room brawl results in a baseball player being killed, leading Briscoe and Green to suspect a sporting grudge is behind the killing. However, a very different vendetta comes to light as the evidence points to a man recently exonerated after serving 20 years in prison for murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A famous novelist dies after undergoing plastic surgery, leading to the discovery that her surgeon made a crucial mistake by prescribing a drug that should not have been mixed with the antidepressants she was already taking. McCoy suggests the next of kin prosecute in a civil case, but Southerlyn disagrees and hunts for further evidence of malpractice(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The Governor of Connecticut's wife is murdered at a Republican Party function and the investigation leads police to uncover a gay love triangle involving her husband. An arrest is soon made, but a key witness is barred from testifying at the trial because he has entered into a civil partnership with the killer(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

With their boss trapped on board the facility, the agents work to save him while he continues to pursue the killer. Meanwhile, Gregorio begins her first day as an official member of the NCIS team(n)

Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Peter Scanavino(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins makes a connection between a series of sexual assaults on young girls that have recently taken place, and some cases she worked on while back in Atlanta, but making a concrete link between the incidents proves difficult. programme.desc: The murder of a gay actor exposes a scandal that threatens to topple a New York church pastor who preaches intolerance toward homosexuals. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Alana De La Garza(n)

programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the death of a publisher found murdered in her apartment. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A dispute over a pair of trousers missing from a dry cleaner's ends in murder - and the ensuing investigation leads Lupo and Green to a businessman working for a shady multinational chain of department stores. Drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto(n)

programme.desc: Lupo and Green are called to the scene after a white teenage boy and a black girl are killed in a shooting near a neighbourhood playground. However, progress is slow when the detectives find locals unwilling to talk about the events, but two brothers who were friends of the murdered boy point them towards a suspect. Jeremy Sisto and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious radio DJ claims to have survived an attack by two men posing as chauffeurs. However, proving the Mafia's involvement depends on a number of unreliable or unavailable witnesses. Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jeweller with ties to the Russian Mob is shot dead in the middle of Times Square. However, another man injured in the gunfire is later identified as one of the two shooters, bringing his accomplice and then the dead man's wife under suspicion(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team is called into action when thousands of classified government files are stolen by an underground hacker collective. programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.desc: The unit's counterparts in Atlanta visit New York for a conference, one of the detectives reports being raped and Rollins decides it is time to reveal a secret. programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles

Meanwhile, Dr Saleyha Ahsan tests some revolutionary new science that could help people easily lose weight and be healthier(n)

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts (1960)
programme.desc: A group of courageous Italian nuns risks everything during the Second World War. Deciding they cannot stand by and do nothing, the sisters begin smuggling Jewish children out of a German internment camp and transporting them to safety - but Nazi troops look set to discover the dangerous secret. Drama, starring Lilli Palmer, Sylvia Syms, Yvonne Mitchell, Ronald Lewis and Albert Lieven(n)

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Lady Persie's life has become increasingly complex, as she continues her illicit affair and pursues her right-wing political interests with little regard for the potential danger to those she loves. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes prepares for motherhood by having her picture taken by celebrated photographer Cecil Beaton - a visit that causes excitement for one particular member of the downstairs staff - and Sir Hallam finds himself dragged into the crisis surrounding the abdication of Edward VIII facing the British monarchy. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Anne Reid and Claire Foy star in the period drama(n)

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: A cross-border collie suffers a setback when a disc from its spine blows and Noel Fitzpatrick designs a special bolt to substitute it.
